name: node-aiready
description: AI Ready Archive — a GROUNDED Node that turns a newsroom archive into AI-discoverable formats (clean markdown, JSON-LD, llms.txt) with article-by-article editorial control over what's exposed.
comment_dependencies: The runtime provides both entrypoints (createServer local, createHostedServer online) and their deps (express/multer/mammoth/anthropic + lazy pg/cookie-parser/jsonwebtoken). We add: turndown (HTML→clean markdown), jszip (in-memory deploy bundle, works local + hosted). pdf-parse + word-extractor are optional (lazy-imported by lib/extract.js for PDF / legacy .doc from a Drive folder); a build without them just can't read those two formats.
